case_title: LI, DONALD DINGUO VS DEGRAW, NICOLE RENEE et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, DONALD DINGUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEGRAW, NICOLE RENEE DEGRAW, MERRITT JR. $3,783.57 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,798.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LI, DONALD DINGUO AS TO DEFENDANT DEGRAW, NICOLE RENEE DEGRAW, MERRITT JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DEGRAW, NICOLE RENEE DEGRAW, MERRITT JR.
